creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
Attempting to build for sparc64 with external toolchain in a GPL-removed FreeBSD tree fails in "stage 4.2: building libraries" with:

/usr/local/bin/sparc64-unknown-freebsd12.0-ld: cannot find crtendS.o: No such file or directory
collect2: error: ld returned 1 exit status
